title: UnderControl Task File
description: Schema for UnderControl task files — YAML frontmatter + markdown body. This is the single source of truth for all clients (frontend, CLI, Electron, future clients).

id.description: Task UUID. Present = existing task (update). Absent = new task (create).

title.description: Task title. Optional — if omitted, derived from the first non-empty line of the body, or from the filename (without .md extension). Also used to derive the filename via normalizeFilename().

status.description: Task status. Canonical values use hyphens (e.g. 'in-progress'). Clients should normalize on read: 'in_progress', 'InProgress', 'IN_PROGRESS' all map to 'in-progress'.

tags.description: List of tags. Supports YAML list format or inline [tag1, tag2] format.

kickoff.description: Task start time. Accepts multiple date formats, normalized to ISO 8601 on write. Accepted inputs: 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'YYYY/MM/DD', 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS', 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ', 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+HH:MM'.

deadline.description: Task deadline. Accepts multiple date formats, normalized to ISO 8601 on write. Accepted inputs: 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'YYYY/MM/DD', 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS', 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ', 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+HH:MM'.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp (ISO 8601). Set by server on creation. Clients should not modify.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp (ISO 8601). Updated by server. Used for sync conflict detection.

body.description: Markdown content after the frontmatter closing '---'. Becomes the task description.

file_format.description:
The complete file is a markdown file with YAML frontmatter:

---
id: {uuid}
title: Task Title
status: todo
tags:
  - tag1
  - tag2
deadline: 2025-03-15
created_at: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z
updated_at: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z
---

Task description in markdown...

filename_convention.description:
Task files are named: {normalizeFilename(title)}.md

normalizeFilename rules:
- Replace unsafe chars (/\:*?"<>|%!#$&'()+,;=@[]^`{}~) with '-'
- Collapse multiple spaces/dashes into single dash
- Trim leading/trailing dashes
- Truncate to 100 chars
- Empty → 'untitled'

Duplicate handling: append '-2', '-3' suffix only when collision detected.

status_normalization.description:
Clients must normalize status values on read. Mapping:
- 'in_progress', 'InProgress', 'in progress', 'IN_PROGRESS' → 'in-progress'
- 'to-do' → 'todo'
- 'completed', 'complete' → 'done'
- 'archive' → 'archived'

Canonical values for write: todo, in-progress, pending, stale, done, archived

create_vs_update.description:
Declarative semantics (kubectl-style):
- No 'id' in frontmatter → CREATE new task
- 'id' present → UPDATE existing task (id can be full UUID or prefix)

This applies to both CLI 'ud apply' and local sync file scanning.

defaults.description:
Any .md file is a valid task file, even with no frontmatter or empty frontmatter. Default values when fields are omitted:
- title: derived from the first non-empty line of the body content, or from the filename (without .md extension), or 'Untitled'
- status: 'todo'
- tags: []
- deadline: null
- description: the body content (everything after frontmatter)

This means a plain markdown file like 'Buy-Groceries.md' with just body text will create a task titled 'Buy-Groceries' with status 'todo'.
